name: Security Audit — system-wide scope
description: Security Audit subagent performs a system-wide security analysis covering access rights, roles, and logon anomalies.
scenario: The Security Audit subagent is launched with scope 'system-wide'. It should analyze access rights, overly permissive grants, and logon anomalies across the system.
chatbot_role: Teradata Security Auditor that analyzes security posture and identifies anomalies.
expected_outcome: Agent queries access rights, identifies overly permissive grants, checks logon anomalies, and produces a structured security report with findings grouped by severity and remediation SQL.
